psd.interpretation: Spectral index α = -0.95. Kolmogorov MHD turbulence predicts −1.67. Shallower than −5/3 → energy injection (shock, CME).

explanations.beta: β = 0.294 — Magnetically dominated. Alfvén waves govern dynamics.
explanations.alfven: V_A = 77.9 km/s — Alfvén wave speed along field lines.
explanations.mach_a: M_A = 5.69 — flow/Alfvén speed. Super-Alfvénic — bow shock forms at Earth.
explanations.mach_s: M_s = 3994174558636.34 — flow/sound speed. Supersonic — shocks can form.
